title: KBS 2026
content: One paper was submitted to Knowledge-Based Systems 2026!

title: PaddlePaddle Open Source Star of the Year
content: Selected as PaddlePaddle Open Source Star of the Year 2025 (Awarded in Beijing, only 10 recipients annually)!

title: University Special Scholarship
content: Awarded the University Special Scholarship (only 10 recipients across the whole university)!

title: Joined Baidu for Internship
content: Joined Baidu as an intern in September 2025!

title: Admitted to Peking University
content: Admitted to Peking University through the postgraduate recommendation program!

title: PaddlePaddle Sailing Program 5th Edition
content: Won 2nd Place in PaddlePaddle Sailing Program 5th Edition (Only undergraduate among all awardees)!

title: Joined Paddle for Remote Internship
content: Joined Paddle as an intern in March 2025!

title: Joined Tencent for Internship
content: Joined Tencent as an intern in July 2024!
